programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Car engines; flour, recliners; envelopes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Disasters at Sea
programme.desc: When a violent crack tears the MSC Napoli apart in January 2017, the crew is left stranded in the English Channel; rescuers must retrieve the crew and move the ship away from busy shipping lanes; investigators discover an alarming design flaw.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: Atlantic Airways Flight 670 mysteriously careens off the runway and down an embankment on the tiny Norwegian island of Stord.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Megaworld
programme.desc: The latest information on Argentina's newest engineering and technological projects.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A quota extension creates an all-out frenzy as the captains scramble to land a few more fish before the season ends; Capt. Reed Meredith knows he has what it takes to lead the fleet; northern boats try to keep pace with the southern fleet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Insight into the production process that go into making everyday items such as conga drums, metal plating and buttons.
